ticket.subject: Re: FedEx Migration Deadline Approaching — Update Your Shopify Shipping App
ticket.raw_subject: Re: FedEx Migration Deadline Approaching — Update Your Shopify Shipping App
ticket.description:
Hi,

How do we know if we have migrated or not? Can you confirm we are good to go after April?

Thank you for your quick feedback,

Thibaut
COO 

On Mon, Mar 16, 2026 at 1:57 PM Madhuri <madhuri@pluginhive.com> wrote:

PluginHive
FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider

Reminder — Migration Deadline
March 31, 2026

Hi there,
We recently notified you about FedEx retiring its legacy Web Services APIs. The deadline is now less than a month away, and we want to make sure your Shopify FedEx shipping app is ready — whether you use PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx (https://followup.pluginhive.com/e/1105462/fedex-shipping-/j4fgjv/1125191128/h/mR_R66mTTeqS5JBpZWNLNrVzxVY_R-h0mNH7CBEpv7A) or PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Solution (https://followup.pluginhive.com/e/1105462/multi-carrier-shipping-label/j4fgjy/1125191128/h/mR_R66mTTeqS5JBpZWNLNrVzxVY_R-h0mNH7CBEpv7A) .
If you have already migrated, no action is required.

If you haven't migrated yet, please note that FedEx will begin retiring Web Services on April 1, 2026 — which may affect real-time rates, label generation, and tracking in your Shopify store.

Migration is Quick & Easy
Open your Shopify app settings, register directly from within the app using your FedEx account details, validate via SMS, email, phone, invoice, or Help Desk — and your REST API credentials are configured automatically. Then just run a quick test to confirm everything works.

✅ As a FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider, both our Shopify apps are fully verified and production-ready for REST APIs. We've done the heavy lifting.

Need Help?
Simply reply to this email or contact support@pluginhive.com — we'll walk you through the entire process.

Get Migration Help Now

Or just hit Reply — our team is standing by.

Best regards,
The PluginHive Team
FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider
support@pluginhive.com

You're receiving this email because you use a PluginHive FedEx shipping app for Shopify.
© 2026 PluginHive. All rights reserved.

​​​​​If you no longer wish to hear from us, please unsubscribe (https://followup.pluginhive.com/unsubscribeConfirm/1105462/a908747800d9752aefe4856c577826efad506ebbc52b08eaa85ac3c89e338814/1125191128) here.

comments.body:
Hello Thibaut,

Good day!

I have checked now in both the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label and Ship Rate and Track apps and the FedEx account is not yet migrated to the new Rest API integration in both the apps.

**PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app** - I could see there are 7 FedEx accounts added in this app and a total of 35 Label Automation rules setup. So, for the Rest API migration without any difficulties, can we connect over a Zoom call and complete this process in the call?
You can let us know a suitable time for the call along with the timezone or book a slot for the call using this link - **Click Here**

**PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx app** - I could see that there are 3 FedEx accounts added in this app. I would need to inform you that the multiple account integration through Rest API in this app is currently not supported.
Our team is working on this and the tentative ETA is 2-3 weeks. Will let you know once this is avialble.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx app - I could see that there are 3 FedEx accounts added in this app. I would need to inform you that the multiple account integration through Rest API in this app is currently not supported. 
Our team is working on this and the tentative ETA is 2-3 weeks. Will let you know once this is avialble.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S

Thank you,

Thibaut

comments.body:
Hello Thibaut Dutartre,

Good Day!

Sagar is not available at the moment.

Yes, we will make sure that the new integration does not cause any disruptions on your store. Before the new integration is completed and tested by you, we can keep the old integration available in the app so that you can switch if needed.

Please **CLICK HERE** to schedule a Zoom call with us, and we will assist you in the migration. It should not take more than 30 min of your time.

Additionally, to make the migration process smoother, please have access to the registered email with FedEx or a recent FedEx Invoice for validation purposes.

Let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Thibaut Dutartre,

Please ignore my last response.

As shared by Sagar in his last response, currently all the features you are using with our app is not available with the FedEx REST integration.

As such, we will not encourage you for the migration as of now.

We will reach out to you once we can confirm that all the features are working with FedEx REST integration to assist you with the migration.

For the time being, please continue using the app with the current integration.

Feel free to reach out if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Thibaut & Sofie,

Good day!

I am reaching out to inform you that all the features including the Auto post-upload of custom documents are live for FedEx with Rest API integration.

The process is simple, you need to reconnect/re-register your FedEx account with the app.  In your case, I see that the FedEx account is connected multiple times with different "Custom Comments" and configurations. You will need to connect each account individually and replicate the same settings after each connection.

Here’s a guide explaining the steps involved: https://www.pluginhive.com/migrate-shopify-store-to-fedex-rest-api/#integration-through-ph-multi-carrier

We can also assist you over a quick Zoom call today or tomorrow to help with this migration. Please let me know your availability, or you may directly book a slot here: [**CLICK HERE**]

**NOTE:**

- Please ensure to download all labels, invoices, and any other documents created with the current FedEx account integration.
- Ensure that all pending label cancellations or pickups are completed before starting the migration.
- After migration, review both your **Shipping Rates** and **Label Generation** rules, and ensure the correct account is selected in each. We can help with this during the call as well.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/l1PNlyswT4nXrHsQxlgHiGqqv/?name=Screenshot+2026-03-30+at+3.15.24+PM.png)

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Thibaut & Sofie,
 
Good day!
 
I am reaching out to inform you that all the features including the Auto post-upload of custom documents are live for FedEx with Rest API integration.
 
The process is simple, you need to reconnect/re-register your FedEx account with the app.  In your case, I see that the FedEx account is connected multiple times with different "Custom Comments" and configurations. You will need to connect each account individually and replicate the same settings after each connection.
 
Here’s a guide explaining the steps involved: https://www.pluginhive.com/migrate-shopify-store-to-fedex-rest-api/#integration-through-ph-multi-carrier
 
We can also assist you over a quick Zoom call today or tomorrow to help with this migration. Please let me know your availability, or you may directly book a slot here: [CLICK HERE]
 
NOTE:
  • Please ensure to download all labels, invoices, and any other documents created with the current FedEx account integration.
  • Ensure that all pending label cancellations or pickups are completed before starting the migration.
  • After migration, review both your Shipping Rates and Label Generation rules, and ensure the correct account is selected in each. We can help with this during the call as well.

 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive

comments.body:
All FedEx integration other than FedEx (USA) are replicated in the app.
For FedEx USA, in old integration Importer of Record in enabled. It is not enabled in the new integration.
Also, the automation rules have to checked and updated with the new integration once the new integration are enabled and old once disabled.

comments.body:
Hello Florian,

Thank you for your patience.

We have reviewed the new FedEx Accounts you have added in the app.

All the integration except **FedEx (USA)** are replicated identically. In case of **FedEx (USA)**, in old integration **Importer of Record** option is enabled. It is not enabled in the new integration as in the attached screenshots.

Please cross check and enable the Importer of Records in the new integration for **FedEx (USA).**

Additionally, once you enable the new integrations and disable the old ones, you will have to update the existing automation rules in the app with the new FedEx accounts integrated as per your requirement.

Let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Florian,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
We have reviewed the new FedEx Accounts you have added in the app.
 
All the integration except FedEx (USA) are replicated identically. In case of FedEx (USA), in old integration Importer of Record option is enabled. It is not enabled in the new integration as in the attached screenshots.
 
Please cross check and enable the Importer of Records in the new integration for FedEx (USA).
 
Additionally, once you enable the new integrations and disable the old ones, you will have to update the existing automation rules in the app with the new FedEx accounts integrated as per your requirement.
 
Let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Labels are failing with new FedEx REST integration for Satisfy Running - HIGH VALUE Customer

The product "**SoftCell™ Hoodie Size 2 (M)**" (**SKU - 11046-91A02-4**) is updated with the Custom Value of 71.81 in the app.

Please check on priority.

1. **Label Failed error for orders with Declared Value** over 100 USD _(in QA)_

3. **Post-upload documents error**_. (I've contacted customer's account representative and cc'd you)_
